## Completed
Reverted the out-of-scope code/dashboard/test diffs flagged by reviewer. Final source diff is doc-only and keeps the AskUserQuestion gate relay guidance.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md` - documents Gate 1/Gate 2 AskUserQuestion Approve/Revise relay, translation to existing foreman calls, and headless fallback.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md` - documents the same behavior in the two-gates table/prose.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
- Verified: full suite passed.
- Verified source diff excluding runtime `.pi` ledger shows only the two doc files.
- No `.ts`, dashboard, test, or `.pi/foreman.json` diffs remain.
